title: erigeron bonariensis
intro: Erigeron bonariensis, also known as Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Americas and Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, offering several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Fleabane can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has also been used in herbal remedies to treat various conditions, including colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
